verses.latin_vulgate: Surge, illuminare, Jerusalem, quia venit lumen tuum,  et gloria Domini super te orta est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֥וּמִי א֖וֹרִי כִּ֣י בָ֣א אוֹרֵ֑ךְ וּכְב֥וֹד יְהֹוָ֖ה עָלַ֥יִךְ זָרָֽח׃
verses.king_james: Arise, shine; for thy light is come, and the glory of the Lord is risen upon thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia ecce tenebræ operient terram,  et caligo populos ;  super te autem orietur Dominus,  et gloria ejus in te videbitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֤ה הַחֹ֙שֶׁךְ֙ יְכַסֶּה־אֶ֔רֶץ וַעֲרָפֶ֖ל לְאֻמִּ֑ים וְעָלַ֙יִךְ֙ יִזְרַ֣ח יְהֹוָ֔ה וּכְבוֹד֖וֹ עָלַ֥יִךְ יֵרָאֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: For, behold, the darkness shall cover the earth, and gross darkness the people: but the Lord shall arise upon thee, and his glory shall be seen upon thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ambulabunt gentes in lumine tuo,  et reges in splendore ortus tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָלְכ֥וּ גוֹיִ֖ם לְאוֹרֵ֑ךְ וּמְלָכִ֖ים לְנֹ֥גַהּ זַרְחֵֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: And the Gentiles shall come to thy light, and kings to the brightness of thy rising.

verses.latin_vulgate: Leva in circuitu oculos tuos, et vide :  omnes isti congregati sunt, venerunt tibi ;  filii tui de longe venient  et filiæ tuæ de latere surgent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׂאִֽי־סָבִ֤יב עֵינַ֙יִךְ֙ וּרְאִ֔י כֻּלָּ֖ם נִקְבְּצ֣וּ בָֽאוּ־לָ֑ךְ בָּנַ֙יִךְ֙ מֵרָח֣וֹק יָבֹ֔אוּ וּבְנוֹתַ֖יִךְ עַל־צַ֥ד תֵּאָמַֽנָה׃
verses.king_james: Lift up thine eyes round about, and see: all they gather themselves together, they come to thee: thy sons shall come from far, and thy daughters shall be nursed at thy side.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc videbis, et afflues ;  mirabitur et dilatabitur cor tuum :  quando conversa fuerit ad te multitudo maris ;  fortitudo gentium venerit tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֤ז תִּרְאִי֙ וְנָהַ֔רְתְּ וּפָחַ֥ד וְרָחַ֖ב לְבָבֵ֑ךְ כִּֽי־יֵהָפֵ֤ךְ עָלַ֙יִךְ֙ הֲמ֣וֹן יָ֔ם חֵ֥יל גּוֹיִ֖ם יָבֹ֥אוּ לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Then thou shalt see, and flow together, and thine heart shall fear, and be enlarged; because the abundance of the sea shall be converted unto thee, the forces of the Gentiles shall come unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inundatio camelorum operiet te,  dromedarii Madian et Epha ;  omnes de Saba venient,  aurum et thus deferentes,  et laudem Domino annuntiantes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִֽׁפְעַ֨ת גְּמַלִּ֜ים תְּכַסֵּ֗ךְ בִּכְרֵ֤י מִדְיָן֙ וְעֵיפָ֔ה כֻּלָּ֖ם מִשְּׁבָ֣א יָבֹ֑אוּ זָהָ֤ב וּלְבוֹנָה֙ יִשָּׂ֔אוּ וּתְהִלֹּ֥ת יְהֹוָ֖ה יְבַשֵּֽׂרוּ׃
verses.king_james: The multitude of camels shall cover thee, the dromedaries of Midian and Ephah; all they from Sheba shall come: they shall bring gold and incense; and they shall shew forth the praises of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omne pecus Cedar congregabitur tibi ;  arietes Nabaioth ministrabunt tibi :  offerentur super placabili altari meo,  et domum majestatis meæ glorificabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־צֹ֤אן קֵדָר֙ יִקָּ֣בְצוּ לָ֔ךְ אֵילֵ֥י נְבָי֖וֹת יְשָֽׁרְת֑וּנֶךְ יַעֲל֤וּ עַל־רָצוֹן֙ מִזְבְּחִ֔י וּבֵ֥ית תִּפְאַרְתִּ֖י אֲפָאֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: All the flocks of Kedar shall be gathered together unto thee, the rams of Nebaioth shall minister unto thee: they shall come up with acceptance on mine altar, and I will glorify the house of my glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui sunt isti qui ut nubes volant,  et quasi columbæ ad fenestras suas ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִי־אֵ֖לֶּה כָּעָ֣ב תְּעוּפֶ֑ינָה וְכַיּוֹנִ֖ים אֶל־אֲרֻבֹּתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Who are these that fly as a cloud, and as the doves to their windows?

verses.latin_vulgate: Me enim insulæ exspectant,  et naves maris in principio,  ut adducam filios tuos de longe ;  argentum eorum, et aurum eorum cum eis,  nomini Domini Dei tui,  et Sancto Israël, quia glorificavit te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־לִ֣י ׀ אִיִּ֣ים יְקַוּ֗וּ וׇאֳנִיּ֤וֹת תַּרְשִׁישׁ֙ בָּרִ֣אשֹׁנָ֔ה לְהָבִ֤יא בָנַ֙יִךְ֙ מֵרָח֔וֹק כַּסְפָּ֥ם וּזְהָבָ֖ם אִתָּ֑ם לְשֵׁם֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהַ֔יִךְ וְלִקְד֥וֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל כִּ֥י פֵאֲרָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Surely the isles shall wait for me, and the ships of Tarshish first, to bring thy sons from far, their silver and their gold with them, unto the name of the Lord thy God, and to the Holy One of Israel, because he hath glorified thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ædificabunt filii peregrinorum muros tuos,  et reges eorum ministrabunt tibi ;  in indignatione enim mea percussi te,  et in reconciliatione mea misertus sum tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָנ֤וּ בְנֵֽי־נֵכָר֙ חֹמֹתַ֔יִךְ וּמַלְכֵיהֶ֖ם יְשָֽׁרְת֑וּנֶךְ כִּ֤י בְקִצְפִּי֙ הִכִּיתִ֔יךְ וּבִרְצוֹנִ֖י רִחַמְתִּֽיךְ׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of strangers shall build up thy walls, and their kings shall minister unto thee: for in my wrath I smote thee, but in my favour have I had mercy on thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et aperientur portæ tuæ jugiter ;  die ac nocte non claudentur,  ut afferatur ad te fortitudo gentium,  et reges earum adducantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפִתְּח֨וּ שְׁעָרַ֧יִךְ תָּמִ֛יד יוֹמָ֥ם וָלַ֖יְלָה לֹ֣א יִסָּגֵ֑רוּ לְהָבִ֤יא אֵלַ֙יִךְ֙ חֵ֣יל גּוֹיִ֔ם וּמַלְכֵיהֶ֖ם נְהוּגִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thy gates shall be open continually; they shall not be shut day nor night; that men may bring unto thee the forces of the Gentiles, and that their kings may be brought.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gens enim et regnum quod non servierit tibi peribit,  et gentes solitudine vastabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הַגּ֧וֹי וְהַמַּמְלָכָ֛ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־יַעַבְד֖וּךְ יֹאבֵ֑דוּ וְהַגּוֹיִ֖ם חָרֹ֥ב יֶחֱרָֽבוּ׃
verses.king_james: For the nation and kingdom that will not serve thee shall perish; yea, those nations shall be utterly wasted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gloria Libani ad te veniet,  abies, et buxus, et pinus simul  ad ornandum locum sanctificationis meæ ;  et locum pedum meorum glorificabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּב֤וֹד הַלְּבָנוֹן֙ אֵלַ֣יִךְ יָב֔וֹא בְּר֛וֹשׁ תִּדְהָ֥ר וּתְאַשּׁ֖וּר יַחְדָּ֑ו לְפָאֵר֙ מְק֣וֹם מִקְדָּשִׁ֔י וּמְק֥וֹם רַגְלַ֖י אֲכַבֵּֽד׃
verses.king_james: The glory of Lebanon shall come unto thee, the fir tree, the pine tree, and the box together, to beautify the place of my sanctuary; and I will make the place of my feet glorious.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et venient ad te curvi filii eorum qui humiliaverunt te,  et adorabunt vestigia pedum tuorum omnes qui detrahebant tibi :  et vocabunt te civitatem Domini,  Sion Sancti Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָלְכ֨וּ אֵלַ֤יִךְ שְׁח֙וֹחַ֙ בְּנֵ֣י מְעַנַּ֔יִךְ וְהִֽשְׁתַּחֲו֛וּ עַל־כַּפּ֥וֹת רַגְלַ֖יִךְ כׇּל־מְנַאֲצָ֑יִךְ וְקָ֤רְאוּ לָךְ֙ עִ֣יר יְהֹוָ֔ה צִיּ֖וֹן קְד֥וֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: The sons also of them that afflicted thee shall come bending unto thee; and all they that despised thee shall bow themselves down at the soles of thy feet; and they shall call thee, The city of the Lord, The Zion of the Holy One of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pro eo quod fuisti derelicta  et odio habita,  et non erat qui per te transiret :  ponam te in superbiam sæculorum,  gaudium in generationem et generationem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּ֧חַת הֱיוֹתֵ֛ךְ עֲזוּבָ֥ה וּשְׂנוּאָ֖ה וְאֵ֣ין עוֹבֵ֑ר וְשַׂמְתִּיךְ֙ לִגְא֣וֹן עוֹלָ֔ם מְשׂ֖וֹשׂ דּ֥וֹר וָדֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Whereas thou hast been forsaken and hated, so that no man went through thee, I will make thee an eternal excellency, a joy of many generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: et suges lac gentium,  et mamilla regum lactaberis ;  et scies quia ego Dominus salvans te,  et redemptor tuus, Fortis Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָנַקְתְּ֙ חֲלֵ֣ב גּוֹיִ֔ם וְשֹׁ֥ד מְלָכִ֖ים תִּינָ֑קִי וְיָדַ֗עַתְּ כִּ֣י אֲנִ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ מֽוֹשִׁיעֵ֔ךְ וְגֹאֲלֵ֖ךְ אֲבִ֥יר יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt also suck the milk of the Gentiles, and shalt suck the breast of kings: and thou shalt know that I the Lord am thy Saviour and thy Redeemer, the mighty One of Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pro ære afferam aurum,  et pro ferro afferam argentum,  et pro lignis æs,  et pro lapidibus ferrum :  et ponam visitationem tuam pacem,  et præpositos tuos justitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּ֣חַת הַנְּחֹ֜שֶׁת אָבִ֣יא זָהָ֗ב וְתַ֤חַת הַבַּרְזֶל֙ אָ֣בִיא כֶ֔סֶף וְתַ֤חַת הָעֵצִים֙ נְחֹ֔שֶׁת וְתַ֥חַת הָאֲבָנִ֖ים בַּרְזֶ֑ל וְשַׂמְתִּ֤י פְקֻדָּתֵךְ֙ שָׁל֔וֹם וְנֹגְשַׂ֖יִךְ צְדָקָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For brass I will bring gold, and for iron I will bring silver, and for wood brass, and for stones iron: I will also make thy officers peace, and thine exactors righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non audietur ultra iniquitas in terra tua ;  vastitas et contritio in terminis tuis :  et occupabit salus muros tuos,  et portas tuas laudatio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יִשָּׁמַ֨ע ע֤וֹד חָמָס֙ בְּאַרְצֵ֔ךְ שֹׁ֥ד וָשֶׁ֖בֶר בִּגְבוּלָ֑יִךְ וְקָרָ֤את יְשׁוּעָה֙ חוֹמֹתַ֔יִךְ וּשְׁעָרַ֖יִךְ תְּהִלָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: Violence shall no more be heard in thy land, wasting nor destruction within thy borders; but thou shalt call thy walls Salvation, and thy gates Praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non erit tibi amplius sol ad lucendum per diem,  nec splendor lunæ illuminabit te :  sed erit tibi Dominus in lucem sempiternam,  et Deus tuus in gloriam tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יִֽהְיֶה־לָּ֨ךְ ע֤וֹד הַשֶּׁ֙מֶשׁ֙ לְא֣וֹר יוֹמָ֔ם וּלְנֹ֕גַהּ הַיָּרֵ֖חַ לֹא־יָאִ֣יר לָ֑ךְ וְהָֽיָה־לָ֤ךְ יְהֹוָה֙ לְא֣וֹר עוֹלָ֔ם וֵאלֹהַ֖יִךְ לְתִפְאַרְתֵּֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: The sun shall be no more thy light by day; neither for brightness shall the moon give light unto thee: but the Lord shall be unto thee an everlasting light, and thy God thy glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non occidet ultra sol tuus,  et luna tua non minuetur,  quia erit tibi Dominus in lucem sempiternam,  et complebuntur dies luctus tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יָב֥וֹא עוֹד֙ שִׁמְשֵׁ֔ךְ וִירֵחֵ֖ךְ לֹ֣א יֵאָסֵ֑ף כִּ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה יִֽהְיֶה־לָּךְ֙ לְא֣וֹר עוֹלָ֔ם וְשָׁלְמ֖וּ יְמֵ֥י אֶבְלֵֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Thy sun shall no more go down; neither shall thy moon withdraw itself: for the Lord shall be thine everlasting light, and the days of thy mourning shall be ended.

verses.latin_vulgate: Populus autem tuus omnes justi ;  in perpetuum hæreditabunt terram :  germen plantationis meæ,  opus manus meæ ad glorificandum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַמֵּךְ֙ כֻּלָּ֣ם צַדִּיקִ֔ים לְעוֹלָ֖ם יִ֣ירְשׁוּ אָ֑רֶץ נֵ֧צֶר (מטעו) [מַטָּעַ֛י] מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה יָדַ֖י לְהִתְפָּאֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: Thy people also shall be all righteous: they shall inherit the land for ever, the branch of my planting, the work of my hands, that I may be glorified.

verses.latin_vulgate: Minimus erit in mille,  et parvulus in gentem fortissimam.  Ego Dominus in tempore ejus  subito faciam istud.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַקָּטֹן֙ יִהְיֶ֣ה לָאֶ֔לֶף וְהַצָּעִ֖יר לְג֣וֹי עָצ֑וּם אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּעִתָּ֥הּ אֲחִישֶֽׁנָּה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: A little one shall become a thousand, and a small one a strong nation: I the Lord will hasten it in his time.
